description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Push that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should also be manually dispatchable. In a single ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository and install various Arduino libraries including TFT_eSPI, LinkedList, lv_arduino, JPEGDecoder, NimBLE-Arduino, Adafruit_NeoPixel, ArduinoJson, and SwitchLib. Then, install ESP32 boards and perform a series of steps to modify the platform.txt file and replace certain text. Finally, build Marauder for the Flipper Zero WiFi Dev Board using Arduino.
